name: Inspect AI (UK AISI)
pricing_notes: Open source (MIT); pay for LLM API calls used during evaluation

auth.notes: Framework; configure LLM provider API keys in environment; connects to any OASST-compatible model

performance.notes: Evaluation throughput depends on LLM call volume; parallel task execution supported

agent_readiness.notes: UK AI Safety Institute's open-source LLM evaluation framework. Task-based evaluations with composable scorers. Supports agentic evaluations (tool-use, multi-turn). Sandbox environments for code execution evaluation. Built-in datasets. Parallel evaluation. Log management. LLM-as-judge support. Growing standard for safety evaluations.

gotchas: Younger framework — smaller community than EleutherAI lm-eval-harness
Agentic evaluation setup requires more configuration than simple QA evals
UK AISI focus means safety evals better supported than capability benchmarks
best_when: Safety and alignment evaluation of LLMs and agents
Agentic evaluations requiring tool-use and multi-turn dialog assessment
Research on LLM capabilities requiring reproducible benchmark infrastructure
Teams aligned with UK AISI safety evaluation methodology
avoid_when: Standard capability benchmarks (use lm-eval-harness for MMLU, HellaSwag, etc.)
Teams needing largest community and plugin ecosystem
summary: Inspect AI is the UK AI Safety Institute's open-source LLM evaluation framework. Task-based evaluations with composable scorers. Supports agentic evaluations with tool-use, multi-turn dialog, and sandbox code execution. LLM-as-judge support. Growing standard for safety evaluations. Best for teams wanting rigorous agentic and safety evaluation infrastructure aligned with AISI methodology.
